brandContext.producer: CARSI — Cleaning and Restoration Science Institute (carsi.com.au)
brandContext.styleNotes: Australian-produced, clean scientific-professional, 230V/10A context, metric, AU workplaces. No text in imagery implying IICRC certification — CARSI is an IICRC-approved CEC provider only. No fabricated performance claims baked into any asset.

note: Source of truth for the images/video the CCW training modules and marketing need. Consumed by the Synthex bridge (scripts/generate-course-media.mjs). Each entry.request is a verbatim payload for the matching Synthex media-gen endpoint. Outputs land in the Synthex media library tagged with entry.tags, and the asset map is written back to ccw-workshop-media-assets.generated.json.

request.prompt: Clean professional illustration for an Australian carpet-cleaning training module: a Razorback-style portable carpet extractor beside a van-mounted truck-mount unit, labelled schematic style, blue and slate palette (#146fc2), technical-diagram aesthetic, white background, no text overlays, crisp vector look.
request.negativePrompt: photorealistic clutter, US power outlets, logos, watermarks, human faces, text

request.prompt: Infographic showing a six-step maintenance cadence timeline: Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Half-Year, End-of-Year, as connected nodes on a rising arc, blue accent (#146fc2) on light background, clean flat design, icon per interval (droplet, filter, valve, descale coil, motor brush, spanner), space for short labels.
request.negativePrompt: photoreal, clutter, watermark, dense text paragraphs

request.script: Machines don't break down mysteriously — they degrade measurably. In this module you'll match your own Carpet Cleaners Warehouse machine — a Razorback portable or a Sapphire or HydraMaster truck-mount — to a six-interval care schedule: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, half-year and end-of-year, plus the hours-based triggers that override the calendar when you're flat out. Whichever comes first, wins. Get this right and every dollar of preventive care saves five to ten in emergency repair.

request.prompt: Vertical ladder infographic titled feel for a stain-removal escalation sequence: six rungs labelled aqueous spotter, pH shift, enzyme, solvent, oxidiser, reducing agent, ascending, blue-to-deep-blue gradient (#2490ed to #146fc2), clean flat vector, light background, small icon per rung.
request.negativePrompt: photoreal, clutter, watermark, gore, hazard imagery

request.prompt: Professional training illustration of a carpet spot-and-stain kit: labelled spray bottles for acid-side, alkaline-side, enzyme, solvent, oxidiser and reducer, arranged neatly, blue accent palette, clean studio-diagram style, white background, no readable brand names.
request.negativePrompt: specific real brand labels, watermark, faces, US products

request.prompt: Nine-step process infographic for stripping and sealing a resilient vinyl floor: numbered steps inspect, protect, dust-mop, apply stripper, agitate, extract, neutral rinse, dry, seal-coats — as a horizontal numbered flow, blue accent (#146fc2), flat clean vector, light background, a small icon per step, step 7 (neutral rinse) subtly emphasised.

request.script: Strip and seal is one of the highest-value add-ons a carpet cleaner can bolt on — and it carries the highest chemical and slip risk, so we teach it as a disciplined nine-step sequence, not a knack. It's a resilient-floor service: vinyl and VCT, never timber, laminate or stone. And remember the rule that separates a job that lasts a year from a callback in three weeks: nine times out of ten a failed strip-and-seal failed at the neutral rinse, not the sealer. Get the rinse right and the finish bonds.

request.prompt: Clean 'profit multiplier' infographic: a central carpet-cleaning visit with spokes to add-on services — carpet protector, deodorising, upholstery, tile & grout, strip & seal, rug cleaning, vehicle interior — hub-and-spoke, blue palette (#146fc2), flat vector, light background, one small icon per spoke, space for labels.
request.negativePrompt: photoreal, clutter, watermark, dollar signs, hype imagery

assets.placement: Module 14 'Remove the Fuel Hazard First' callout

request.prompt: Safety diagram for vehicle interior detailing: cross-section of a car showing petrol vapour (shown as heavier-than-air shading) pooling in the footwell and boot, with a clear icon indicating remove the enclosed fuel container before cleaning, warning-amber and blue palette, clean technical-safety illustration, light background, no faces.
request.negativePrompt: fire, explosion gore, photoreal, watermark, graphic hazard

request.prompt: Hub-and-spoke marketing diagram: one video at the centre flowing to five channels — YouTube, Google Business Profile, Facebook, Instagram, Website — each labelled with its role (library, shopfront, reminders, reels, closes the sale), blue palette (#146fc2), clean flat vector, light background, connecting lines back to a service page.
request.negativePrompt: photoreal, clutter, watermark, specific brand logos

request.script: Technical excellence with an empty diary is a hobby. In 2026, video connected across your channels is the front door to a local cleaning business — and almost none of your competitors are doing it well. One honest thirty-second before-and-after, filmed on the job, surfacing on your YouTube, your Google Business Profile, Facebook, Instagram and your website — from one filming session. This module shows you exactly how to wire those channels together and the weekly rhythm that fills the diary.

request.prompt: Course card thumbnail for 'The Carpet Cleaning Workshop' by CARSI: a clean confident cover with a subtle carpet-fibre texture and a truck-mount silhouette, deep blue (#0c141d) to accent blue (#146fc2), premium training-brand look, room for a title, no readable body text.
request.negativePrompt: clutter, watermark, US imagery, stocky people

request.prompt: Social media square promo for an Australian 2-day carpet cleaning workshop: bold clean composition, blue accent (#2490ed), a hands-on-training feel, space for a headline, professional and trustworthy, no fabricated claims or statistics in the image.
request.negativePrompt: hype, fake badges, watermark, dense text, US spelling

request.prompt: Vertical story promo for the CARSI 2-day Carpet Cleaning Workshop: clean premium look, blue palette, space for a headline and a call-to-action at the base, professional Australian training brand, no fabricated claims.
request.negativePrompt: hype, fake badges, watermark, US spelling

request.prompt: A 30-second premium trailer feel for an Australian hands-on 2-day carpet cleaning workshop: clean blue-accented brand motion, glimpses of carpet fibre, a truck-mount, a strip-and-seal floor and a before/after, professional and calm, room for title cards.
